targetSequence.desc: CLK↑, EN=0: hold — no toggle when disabled
CLK↑, EN=0: hold again — disabled still prevents toggle

hint: D = EN XOR Q. Wire EN and Q_out into an XOR gate; feed its output into D. CLK connects to the flip-flop clock. When EN=0, D=Q so the flip-flop holds; when EN=1, D=NOT(Q), so it toggles.
title: Enabled Toggle Flip-Flop
objective: Toggle Q on each clock edge only when EN=1; hold state when EN=0
description: Extend the basic T flip-flop with an Enable control. Q toggles on every rising clock edge when EN=1. When EN=0 the flip-flop ignores the clock and keeps its current value.
